predicates.name: is_legal_cohabitant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a legal cohabitant of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_longest_living_legal_cohabitant
predicates.description: The first person is the longest-living legal cohabitant of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_deceased
predicates.description: The person is deceased and their estate has opened.

predicates.name: inherits_together_with_heirs
predicates.description: The first person (surviving cohabitant) inherits together with any heirs of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_main_family_residence
predicates.description: The property served as the main family residence at the time the estate of the deceased person opened.

predicates.name: is_household_goods
predicates.description: The first property consists of household goods present in the second property (the main family residence) at the time the estate opened.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_return_4_24
predicates.description: The property is subject to a right of legal return as referred to in article 4.24.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_return_4_25
predicates.description: The property is subject to a right of legal return as referred to in article 4.25.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_residence
predicates.description: The longest-living legal cohabitant acquires usufruct of the immovable property that served as the main family residence.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_household_goods
predicates.description: The longest-living legal cohabitant acquires usufruct of the household goods present in the main family residence.

predicates.name: exercises_usufruct_despite_legal_return
predicates.description: The longest-living legal cohabitant exercises the right of usufruct over the property even if it is subject to a right of legal return under article 4.24 or 4.25.
